steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Renova Energia Dec 2024
shares = 249_483_956
price = 2.60
market_cap = price * shares

# Balance sheet items (values in BRL)
assets = 3061346000.0
cash = 144216000.0
current_assets = 288269000.0
current_liabilities = 362642000.0
short_term_debt = 33691000.0
long_term_debt = 1110499000.0

debt_bruta = short_term_debt + long_term_debt

debt_liquida = debt_bruta - cash

# Income statement items
revenue_12m = 259226000.0  # Receita de Venda de Bens e/ou Serviços (12 meses)
revenue_sep = 167885000.0
revenue_qtr = revenue_12m - revenue_sep

ebit_12m = 16816000.0  # Resultado Antes do Resultado Financeiro e dos Tributos
ebit_sep = 64231000.0
ebit_qtr = ebit_12m - ebit_sep

net_income_12m = -117069000.0
net_income_sep = -49420000.0
net_income_qtr = net_income_12m - net_income_sep

# Depreciation (note values are negative in report)
dep_amort = -98148000.0
# Depreciation absolute
dep_abs = abs(dep_amort)

# EBITDA = EBIT + Depreciation
ebitda_12m = ebit_12m + dep_abs

# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_income_12m / shares
vpa = 815951000.0 / shares  # Patrimonio liquido / shares
revenue_per_share = revenue_12m / shares
assets_per_share = assets / shares
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else None
p_ebit = price / (ebit_12m / shares) if ebit_12m != 0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share if revenue_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share != 0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro  # same measure

# EV calculations
ev = market_cap + debt_liquida

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_12m if ebitda_12m != 0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12m if ebit_12m != 0 else None

# Margins
marg_bruta = ( -30878000.0 / revenue_12m ) * 100  # Resultado Bruto / Receita líquida
marg_ebit = ( ebit_12m / revenue_12m ) * 100
marg_liquida = ( net_income_12m / revenue_12m ) * 100

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = ( ebit_12m / assets ) * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = 65404000.0
roic = ( ebit_12m / ( assets - fornecedores - cash ) ) * 100

# ROE
roe = ( net_income_12m / 815951000.0 ) * 100

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities != 0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim
div_br_patrim = debt_bruta / 815951000.0 if 815951000.0 != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida / Ativo
giro_ativos = revenue_12m / assets

# Prepare results
results = {
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'shares': shares,
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': cash,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': debt_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': debt_liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': 815951000.0,
    'Receita La (12m)': revenue_12m,
    'Receita La (3m)': revenue_qtr,
    'EBIT (12m)': ebit_12m,
    'EBIT (3m)': ebit_qtr,
    'Lucro Lo (12m)': net_income_12m,
    'Lucro Lo (3m)': net_income_qtr,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': p_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV/EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV/EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'Marg. Bruta %': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT %': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. La %': marg_liquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo %': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC %': roic,
    'ROE %': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': div_br_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos,
}

# Print results
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
